    Returns:

    command = ["last", username]
    result = subprocess.run(
        command,
        capture_output=True,
        text=True,
        check=False  # Handle errors explicitly instead of raising immediately
    )

    # Handle execution errors (non-zero exit code indicates actual failure, not empty records)
    if result.returncode != 0:
        error_msg = result.stderr.strip() or f"Command failed with exit code {result.returncode}"
        raise RuntimeError(f"Failed to retrieve login records: {error_msg}")

    # Post-process to ensure only lines with exact username in first column are kept
    filtered_lines = []

        if not stripped_line:
